name: Apprentice
benefit: Select a single 0-level spell from the sorcerer / wizard spell list. You can cast this spell 1 time per day as a spell-like ability

name: Arcane Scholar
benefit: Choose either Knowledge (arcana) or Spellcraft ; you gain a +1 trait bonus on that skill and it is a class skill for you

name: Authoritarian
benefit: As long as you are acting in the service of a liege or leader you recognize as legitimate, you gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against fear and compulsion effects

name: Beacon of Faith

description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Beacon of Faith You wield the might of your faith with power and clarity.

name: Birthmark
benefit: This birthmark can serve you as a divine focus for casting spells, and as a physical manifestation of your faith, and it increases your devotion to your god. You gain a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against charm and compulsion effects
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Birthmark You were born with a strange birthmark that looks very similar to the holy symbol of the god you chose to worship later in life.

name: Blessed
benefit: Once per day as a swift action , you gain a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws for 1 round
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Blessed Some divine agent watches over you and heeds your call.

name: Blessed Touch
benefit: You heal 1 additional point of damage when using lay on hands , channeling energy, or casting a cure spell

name: Called
benefit: Once per day upon rolling a natural 1 on an attack roll , you may reroll the die and take the second result instead

name: Canon of Coin
benefit: Appraise is a class skill for you. So long as you are carrying coins worth an amount equal to at least 100 gp per character level you have, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saves. This bonus increases to +2 against effects that would force you to discard, drop, or give away coins, gems, or trade goods in your possession

name: Caretaker
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Heal checks, and Heal is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Caretaker As the child of an herbalist or an assistant in a temple infirmary, you often had to assist in tending to the sick and wounded.

name: Child of the Temple
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) and Knowledge (religion) checks, and one of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Child of the Temple You have long served at a temple in a city, where you picked up on many of the nobility’s customs in addition to spending much time in the temple libraries studying your faith.

name: Chosen One
benefit: You may cast light once per day as a spell-like ability ( caster level 1st), and you begin play with a masterwork longsword . In addition, whenever light is cast upon this sword, the radius of light and its duration is doubled

name: Crusader
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls against outsiders with the chaotic subtype

name: Darkest Before Dawn
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against spells with the emotion, fear , or pain descriptor . Once per day, you can increase this bonus to +4 for a single save, but you must make this decision before you attempt the saving throw

name: Defy Madness
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on any saving throws against confusion, insanity, madness, and Wisdom damage and drain
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Defy Madness (Old Cults) Your direct involvement with supernatural and alien forces has left you less vulnerable to the insanity they cause.

name: Devoted Healer
benefit: Whenever you take 20 on a Heal check to treat deadly wounds, you restore an additional 1d4 hit points to those you aid

name: Devotee of the Green
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) and Knowledge (nature) checks, and one of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Devotee of the Green Your faith in the natural world or one of the gods of nature makes it easy for you to pick up on related concepts.

name: Disdainful Defender
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Will saves you attempt against divine spells. This bonus does not apply against divine spells cast by a caster who worships the same deity you do
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Disdainful Defender You are resistant to the magic of other faiths.

name: Ease of Faith
benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on Diplomacy checks, and Diplomacy is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Ease of Faith Your mentor, the person who invested your faith in you from an early age, took steps to ensure you understood that what powers your divine magic is no different from that which powers the magic of other religions. This philosophy makes it easier for you to interact with others who may not share your views.

name: Empyreal Pantheon
benefit: Select either the law or chaos alignment descriptor. You may cast spells with that descriptor, even if your alignment or that of your god would normally not allow it. Doing so applies the good descriptor to the spell if it does not already apply

name: Exalted of the Society
prerequisites: Cleric, Society; of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction
benefit: You may channel energy 1 additional time per day. Something Missing? This previously had a requirement or prerequisite of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction. We are not legally allowed to reference these nations or factions. GMs should consider whether such requirements suit their campaign or not. If you wish to see the original wording it is probably available on our sister site pathfindercommunity.net
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Exalted of the Society (Cleric, Society) The vaults of the great city contain many secrets of the divine powers of the gods, and you have studied your god extensively.

name: Faithful Feedback
benefit: Whenever you cast a spell belonging to the healing subschool on someone of your religion, increase the hit points healed by +1
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Faithful Feedback (any religion) A shared religious fervor makes your healing magic more effective.

name: Fate’s Favored
benefit: Whenever you are under the effect of a luck bonus of any kind, that bonus increases by 1
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Fate’s Favored The fates watch over you.

name: Fearless Defiance
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against fear effects. In addition, if you successfully save against such an effect, you receive a +1 trait bonus on attack rolls against your favored enemies for 1 round
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Fearless Defiance Upon overcoming your fear, you become a scourge to your enemies.

name: First Memories
benefit: You do not gain the normal list of spell-like abilities for the gnome magic racial trait. Instead, if you have a Wisdom of 11 of higher, you gain the following spell-like abilities: 1/dayâ detect poison , know direction , stabilize , and speak with animals . The caster level for these effects is equal to your character level. The DC for these spells is equal to 10 + the spellâs level + your Wisdom modifier
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > First Memories (Gnome)

name: Focused Disciple
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against charm and compulsion effects
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Focused Disciple When weaker wills falter, you keep a clear mind.

name: Heedful Readiness
benefit: Once per day, you can add your Wisdom modifier to an initiative check

name: History of Heresy
benefit: As long as you do not possess any levels in a class that grants divine spellcasting power, you gain a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against divine spells
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > History of Heresy You were raised with heretical views that have made it difficult for you to accept most religious beliefs and often caused you or those you love to be treated as pariahs. As a result, you have turned your back on religious teachings.

name: Honest
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks. This bonus increases to +2 when the Diplomacy check is made to influence those who are already friendly or helpful toward you

name: Indomitable Faith
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saves
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Indomitable Faith You were born in a region where your faith was not popular, but you still have never abandoned it. Your constant struggle to maintain your own faith has bolstered your drive.

name: Inspired
benefit: Once per day as a free action , roll twice and take the better result on a skill check or ability check
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Inspired A positive force, philosophy, or divine presence fills you with hope, and is a guiding force of inspiration.

name: Irrepressible
benefit: You can use your Charisma modifier in place of your Wisdom modifier when attempting Will saving throws against charm and compulsion effects

name: Loyalty across Lifetimes
benefit: Your eidolon treats its Constitution score as if it were 2 points higher for the purposes of determining when its negative hit point total sends it back to its home plane. In addition, your eidolon gains a +1 trait bonus on Will saves against enchantment spells and effects
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Loyalty across Lifetimes You and your eidolon share a link that seems to span multiple lifetimes.

name: Martial Manuscript
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on rolls to confirm critical hits when you’re using an unarmed strike or monk weapon
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Martial Manuscript You either carry or have memorized a sacred text from your school, temple, or monastery, and its wisdom gives you insight that makes your attacks more devastating.

name: Masked
benefit: Once per day, when attempting a Disguise check, roll twice and take the better result

name: Meditative Rest
benefit: When you rest, you ignore the first time you are interrupted during that rest for the purposes of determining how long you need to rest in full to regain the capacity to regain spells, provided the interruption lasts no more than 15 minutes. If you cast spells during this interruption, you don’t count these against your daily limit of spells when you wake and prepare spells

name: Mystery Initiate
benefit: Once per day, you may reroll any Knowledge skill check. You must decide to use this ability after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse

name: Necrotic Aura
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against spells from the necromancy school or any effect that deals negative energy damage
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Necrotic Aura Your exposure to the necromantic arts has strengthened your defenses against its vile rot.

name: Oathbound
benefit: Once per day, you may reroll a saving throw against a charm or compulsion effect. You must take the second result even if it is worse
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Oathbound You have made a solemn oath, and you pursue that oath with headstrong determination.

name: Omen
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you. Once per day, you may attempt to demoralize an opponent as a swift action
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Omen You are the harbinger of some future event. Whether this event bodes good or ill, you exude an ominous presence.

name: Pact Servant
benefit: You may treat Asmodeus as if he were a lawful neutral deity for the purposes of determining your own alignment as a cleric , inquisitor , or other divine spellcaster. You may not select the evil domain unless your own alignment also contains an evil aspect

name: Patient Calm
benefit: Choose one Craft or Profession skill. Whenever you take 10 with that skill, determine the result as if you had rolled a 12 instead of a 10

name: Perpetual Companion
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against fear effects whenever your eidolon is within 30 feet
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Perpetual Companion You are bolstered against fear when your eidolon is near.

name: Planar Savant
benefit: You may use your Charisma modifier when making Knowledge (planes) checks instead of your Intelligence modifier
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Planar Savant You have always had an innate sense of the workings of the planes and their denizens.

name: Principled
benefit: You take a –2 penalty on Bluff checks and gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against charm , compulsion , and emotion effects
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Principled You hold yourself to a strict code of behavior that guides all of your decisions and actions.

name: Prophesied
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks and Intimidate checks when interacting with anyone familiar with you or your reputation
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Prophesied Your coming was foretold in prophecy, and people familiar with your legend regard you with awe and fear.

name: Redeemer
benefit: When acting as a sponsor for an evil creature seeking redemption, your patience and kindness grant the creature a +3 bonus on its save rather than a +1 bonus

name: Reincarnated

name: River Acumen
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Swim checks in rivers or streams, and a +2 trait bonus on Survival checks to forage for food in or near a river or stream

name: Sacred Conduit
benefit: Whenever you channel energy , you gain a +1 trait bonus to the save DC of your channeled energy
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Sacred Conduit Your birth was particularly painful and difficult for your mother, who needed potent divine magic to ensure that you survived (your mother may or may not have survived). In any event, that magic infused you from an early age, and you now channel divine energy with greater ease than most.

name: Sacred Touch
benefit: As a standard action , you may automatically stabilize a dying creature merely by touching it
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Sacred Touch You were exposed to a potent source of positive energy as a child, perhaps by being born under the right cosmic sign, or maybe because one of your parents was a gifted healer.

name: Scholar of the Great Beyond
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (history) and Knowledge (planes) checks, and one of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you

You take to philosophical discussions of the Great Beyond and of historical events with ease.

name: Schooled Inquisitor
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Knowledge (planes) and Knowledge (religion) checks made to identify the abilities and weaknesses of creatures
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Schooled Inquisitor Your additional training aids in identifying the wiles of your faith’s enemies.

name: Secret Keeper
benefit: You gain a +3 trait bonus on Bluff checks when they are opposed by anotherâs Sense Motive check

name: Spell Intuition
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks, and Spellcraft becomes a class skill for you

name: Spirit Sense
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Perception checks to avoid being surprised and to detect invisible or incorporeal creatures
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Spirit Sense You are so attuned to the spiritual world that it is hard to get the jump on you.

name: Saintâs Ward
benefit: As a standard action, you can recite a holy chant that affects demons as if you were under the effect of a sanctuary spell (caster level equal to 1/2 your Hit Dice + your Charisma modifier)

name: Stalwart of the Society
prerequisites: Paladin, Society; of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction

name: Strength of Submission
benefit: Whenever you are under the effects of a compulsion effect, you gain a +1 trait bonus on attack and damage rolls

name: Student of History
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (history) checks, and Knowledge (history) is a class skill for you

name: Tireless Avenger
benefit: When you’re in pursuit of one of your favored enemies , the DC for the Constitution check to avoid taking lethal damage during a forced march is 10 + 1 per extra hour, instead of 10 + 2 per extra hour

name: Traditionalist
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) checks, and Knowledge (nobility) is a class skill for you

name: Undaunted
benefit: You increase the DC to demoralize you with an Intimidate check by 2

name: Unnatural Presence
benefit: You can use your Intimidate skill to demoralize animals and vermin; Intimidate is a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Unnatural Presence (Old Cults) Your prolonged association with alien forces leaks from your pores.

name: Unshackled
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Escape Artist checks, and Escape Artist is a class skill for you

name: Untrained Scholar
benefit: Once per day, you can attempt a Knowledge (geography), Knowledge (history) or Knowledge (local) check untrained with a +2 trait bonus

name: Wanderer’s Shroud
benefit: Efforts to use the Diplomacy skill to gather information about you take a â1 penalty, and you gain a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws against scrying and mind-reading effects that allow saving throws
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Wanderer’s Shroud Your wanderings often go unnoticed.

name: Zealot

name: Zealous Striker
benefit: While you have the destruction judgment active, you gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls when attacking a foe who can cast divine spells and worships a different deity than you
description: Home > Traits > Faith Traits > Zealous Striker Your zeal is a danger to those of “lesser” faiths.

name: Family Traits
benefit: to apply. For a character to count as having the same trait, they must be your family member. At the GM’s discretion, the âfamilyâ for some of these traits could in fact be another group with strong interpersonal ties and common interests, such as a martial arts school, army unit, mutual protection society, or criminal gang. name: Air-Touched
benefit: You gain DR 1/â against creatures and attacks with the air type
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Air-Touched You share an affinity with elemental air.

benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Craft (alchemy) checks made to craft alchemical items. Furthermore, when you fail a Craft (alchemy) check by 5 or more but don’t roll a natural 1, you don’t ruin any raw materials or have to pay that cost again
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Alchemical Adept You are skilled in creating alchemical items.

name: Alchemical Intuition
benefit: Once per day as a free action , you may gain a trait bonus equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum 0) on a Craft (alchemy) check you make. You can apply this bonus after you roll the check, possibly turning a failure into a success
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Alchemical Intuition You are often struck with epiphanies about alchemical processes and substances.

name: Ancient Adherent
benefit: While you suffer a physical ailment, such as disease , poison , or ability damage to Strength , Dexterity , or Constitution (but not including hit point damage), you gain a +2 trait bonus on Will saving throws. While you suffer a mental ailment, including insanity, any charm or compulsion effect, or ability damage to Intelligence , Wisdom , or Charisma , you gain a +2 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws

name: Arcane Revitalization
benefit: Once per day, when you confirm a critical hit with a weapon attack, you regain 1 arcane pool point. You can’t exceed your maximum number of arcane pool points
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Arcane Revitalization Your martial prowess can feed your arcane power.

name: Arcane Temper
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on concentration and initiative checks
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Arcane Temper You have quick reactions and fierce concentration.

name: Ascendant Recollection
benefit: Your sorcerer level is considered to be 1 level higher when determining the effects of your 1st-level bloodline power
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Ascendant Recollection Your first bloodline power is particularly strong.

name: Balancer’s Banishing
benefit: As long as you remain neutral, whenever you cast a spell that would send an outsider with the chaotic , evil , good , or lawful subtype back to its home plane, the spell’s saving throw DC increases by 1

name: Beast of the Society
prerequisites: Druid, Society; of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction
benefit: Whenever you use your wild shape class ability to turn yourself into a Small or Medium-sized animal, the effect lasts for 2 hours per druid level instead of 1 hour per druid level. description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Beast of the Society (Druid, Society) A master druid revealed to you greater secrets of concentration when changing your form into that of an animal.

name: Bladed Magic
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Craft checks made to craft magic or masterwork weapons. In addition, when you use your arcane pool class ability to grant a weapon an enhancement bonus , that bonus lasts for 2 minutes instead of 1
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Bladed Magic You have an innate talent for using magical weaponry and those weapons capable of becoming magical.

name: Charlatan
benefit: As a swift action , you may expend one prepared spell or spell slot to gain a bonus on the next Bluff check you make, provided the check takes place before the beginning of your next turn. The bonus on this check is equal to the level of the spell consumed. You may use this ability 3 times per day
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Charlatan (Gnome)

name: Child of the Moon
benefit: Choose either Climb, Stealth, or Swim. You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks made with the chosen skill. On dates during and after the first quarter of a lunar phase but before end of the last quarter (the half of the lunar cycle where the moon is fuller), this bonus increases to +2. During the full moon, this bonus increases to +4

name: Classically Schooled
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks, and Spellcraft is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Classically Schooled Your apprenticeship or early education was particularly focused on the direct application of magic.

name: Cross-Disciplined
benefit: Once per day, you may cast a spell you have prepared that appears on both the magus and wizard spell lists as if your caster level were 1 level higher
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Cross-Disciplined Your dabbling has granted you greater insight into the proper casting of certain spells.

name: Cross-Knowledge
benefit: Once per day, you may treat an extract you drink as if your caster level were 1 level higher as long as that extract appears on the wizard spell list and the alchemist list of formulae
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Cross-Knowledge

name: Dangerously Curious
benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on Use Magic Device checks, and Use Magic Device is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Dangerously Curious You have always been intrigued by magic, possibly because you were the child of a magician or priest. You often snuck into your parent’s laboratory or shrine to tinker with spell components and magic devices, and frequently caused quite a bit of damage and headaches for your parent as a result.

name: Deep Guardian
benefit: Any creature you conjure with a summon spell that has the earth subtype or a burrow speed gains a +1 morale bonus on attack rolls and a +1 enhancement bonus to Armor Class for the duration of the spell that summoned it
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Deep Guardian (Dwarf)

name: Demonblight Resistance
benefit: You gain a +3 trait bonus on saving throws against diseases you are exposed to while fighting one or more creatures of the demon subtype, or while such a hostile creature is within 100 feet

name: Desperate Focus
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on concentration checks
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Desperate Focus

name: Desperate Resolve
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on concentration checks. This trait bonus increases to + 4 when you are grappled , pinned , in violent weather, or entangled
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Desperate Resolve You are adept at casting spells even in the most precarious situations.

name: Desperate Speed
benefit: Your eidolon receives a +5-foot enhancement bonus to one type of speed it has that you do not, such as a climb or swim speed. If your eidolon doesn’t already possess such a mode of movement, you may apply this trait bonus later if it gains an evolution that grants it such a mode. Once this bonus is applied to a mode of movement, it can’t be switched to another mode
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Desperate Speed Your eidolon excels at a movement type you do not possess.

name: Diabolical Dabbler
benefit: Each fiendish animal you conjure with any summon spell gains +1 hit point per hit die for the duration of the spell that summoned it
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Diabolical Dabbler

name: Distance Aptitude
benefit: Treat your caster level as 1 higher for the purposes of determining the range of spells and spell-like abilities

name: Domineering
benefit: Choose one 1st-level enchantment spell you are capable of casting. The DC of that spell increases by 1

name: Draconic Infusion
benefit: Choose the acid, cold, electricity, or fire spell descriptor when you take this trait. Once per day for every 2 caster levels you have (minimum once per day), when you cast a spell that has your chosen elemental descriptor, you can deal an additional 1d4 points of damage of that energy type to one target of that spell

name: Earth-Touched
benefit: You gain DR 1/â against creatures and attacks with the earth type
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Earth-Touched You share an affinity with elemental earth.

name: Earthbound
benefit: While you are touching the ground, you add a +2 trait bonus to saving throw DCs and on caster level checks to overcome spell resistance for all spells you cast against creatures with the air subtype
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Earthbound (Dwarf)

name: Eldritch Auditor
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks and Will saves to identify an itemâs true properties, such as against spells like magic aura

name: Eldritch Delver
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Knowledge (dungeoneering) and Knowledge (history) checks, and you may treat your caster level as 1 level higher for all conjuration spells of the teleportation subschool
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Eldritch Delver You have an unquenchable thirst for knowledge about the world and desire to obtain it firsthand.

name: Enduring Mutagen
benefit: The bonuses and penalties granted by your mutagens last for 1 additional minute per alchemist level
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Enduring Mutagen Because of special training, your unique body chemistry, or the uncovering of an alchemical secret, your mutagens last longer.

name: Fey Protection
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus to AC against attacks of opportunities made by fey and a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against the effects of fey creatures

name: Flame-Touched
benefit: You gain DR 1/â against creatures and attacks with the fire type
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Flame-Touched You share an affinity with elemental fire.

name: Focused Burn
benefit: Any bombs you have that deal fire damage deal 1 additional point of fire damage on a direct hit per 2d6 of fire damage normally dealt (minimum 1 point). This additional damage does not apply to the bomb’s splash damage
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Focused Burn You know the secret of making punishing fire bombs.

name: Focused Mind
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on concentration checks
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Focused Mind Your childhood was dominated either by lessons of some sort (whether musical, academic, or other) or by a horrible home life that encouraged your ability to block out distractions and focus on the immediate task at hand.

name: Fortunate
benefit: Once per day when you use a spell or magic item with a randomized effect (such as confusion , mirror image , prismatic spray , or a bag of tricks), before you roll to determine the result, you may choose to roll twice and pick either result

name: Ghost Sight
benefit: You receive a +2 trait bonus to Perception checks when trying to locate undead, and can attempt to locate ethereal undead (though they are still considered merely invisible, +20 to Stealth)
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Ghost Sight

name: Gifted Adept
benefit: Pick one spell when you choose this traitâfrom this point on, whenever you cast that spell, its effects manifest at +1 caster level
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Gifted Adept Your interest in magic was inspired by witnessing a spell being cast in a particularly dramatic method, perhaps even one that affected you physically or spiritually. This early exposure to magic has made it easier for you to work similar magic on your own.

name: Greater Adept of the Society
prerequisites: Wizard, Society; of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction
benefit: You gain one additional 0-level spell slot. Something Missing? This previously had a requirement or prerequisite of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction. We are not legally allowed to reference these nations or factions. GMs should consider whether such requirements suit their campaign or not. If you wish to see the original wording it is probably available on our sister site pathfindercommunity.net
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Greater Adept of the Society (Wizard, Society) Months of meditation and practice with the greatest wizards of the Society have given you an increased capacity for arcane knowledge.

name: Greater Link
benefit: Your eidolon ‘s current and maximum hit point totals are not reduced by 50% until you are separated by 110 feet or more. Your eidolon ‘s current and maximum hit point totals are not reduced by 75% until you are separated by 1,100 feet or more. All other aspects of your life link class feature are unaffected
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Greater Link The link between you and your eidolon is stronger than most.

name: Greater Purpose
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all saving throws to resist death effects and a +1 trait bonus on Constitution checks made to stabilize while dying
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Greater Purpose You are convinced you’re alive to achieve a great purpose.

name: Green-Blooded
benefit: Choose a single 0-level druid spell. You can cast this spell once per day as a spell-like ability with a caster level equal to your character level

name: Guiding Spirit
benefit: Once per day as a swift action , you can look to your guiding spirit for advice. The next time you roll a d20 in that same round, roll twice and pick the better result. If one of these two rolls is a natural 20, you can use this ability again that same day

name: Havoc of the Society
prerequisites: Sorcerer, Society; of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction
benefit: Whenever you cast a spell that deals damage, you gain a +1 trait bonus to the total damage dealt. This damage is considered force damage regardless of the type of damage dealt by the spell. Something Missing? This previously had a requirement or prerequisite of citizenship of a specific nation or membership in a specific faction. We are not legally allowed to reference these nations or factions. GMs should consider whether such requirements suit their campaign or not. If you wish to see the original wording it is probably available on our sister site pathfindercommunity.net
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Havoc of the Society (Sorcerer, Society) Through countless hours studying vast libraries of arcane power, you have learned how to cause greater damage to your foes.

name: Hedge Magician
benefit: Whenever you craft a magic item, you reduce the required gp cost to make the item by 5%
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Hedge Magician You apprenticed for a time to an artisan who often built magic items, and he taught you many handy shortcuts and cost-saving techniques.

name: Horrifying Mind
benefit: When a non-evil humanoid attempts to read your mind via a magical effect, the reader must attempt a Will save opposed by your Wisdom or Charisma check (your choice). If the reader fails this save, she is shaken for 1 round. If she fails by 10 or more, she is instead frightened for 1 round, then shaken for 1 round. Pick up Champions of Corruption AND support this site!

name: House of Green Mothers Pupil
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Handle Animal checks. You may substitute this trait for Iron Will as the prerequisite for the Familiar Bond feat

name: Insistent Benefactor
benefit: Whenever you cast a harmless spell, you gain a +2 trait bonus on caster level checks to overcome spell resistance , and the saving throw DC of the spell (if any) is increased by 2
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Insistent Benefactor You have perfected the art of forcing your magical boons on your allies.

name: Inured to Death
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against death effects

name: Keen Appraiser
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Appraise checks. In addition, you need only exceed the DC of an Appraise check by 2 in order to determine whether the item in question has magic properties (although success still does not grant knowledge of the magic item’s abilities)

name: Kin Bond
benefit: Choose a single sibling with whom to share this bond. Once per day when you fail a saving throw while your sibling is within 30 feet, you may reroll that saving throw using your sibling’s saving throw modifier. If you and the sibling are twins or otherwise part of a multiple birth, you gain a +2 trait bonus on the rerolled saving throw. Your sibling must be willing to grant you the reroll. If you fail the saving throw, you and your sibling are dazed for 1 round
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Kin Bond The bond between you and a close sibling is nearly mystical.

name: Knowledgeable Caster
benefit: Once per day when you cast a divination spell, you can cast that spell as if your caster level were 1 level higher in the appropriate class. You also gain a +1 trait bonus on any Knowledge checks associated with your sorcerer bloodline , if any
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Knowledgeable Caster

name: Lamiaâs Bane
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against enchantment effects and a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against the spells and spell-like abilities of lamias

name: Linked Surge
benefit: Once per day, you may make a Strength – or Constitution -based ability check or skill check using you eidolon ‘s ability score in place of your own. Your eidolon must be summoned and with 30 feet for you to use this trait
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Linked Surge

name: Lucid Dreamer
benefit: You receive a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (planes) checks and a +2 trait bonus on Will saves against effects on your dreaming mind or subconscious, such as a night hagâs dream haunting ability, the nightmare spell, and illusions of the phantasm subschool
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Lucid Dreamer Your dreams are a special place of power that only you get to enjoy; driving away threats to your subconscious is as easy as slamming a door.

name: Lunar Birth
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against the spells and spell-like abilities cast by humans

name: Magic Crafter
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Appraise checks and a +1 bonus on any Craft checks attempted while making magic items
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Magic Crafter Your early magical training involved study of the properties and creation of magic items.

name: Magical Flair
benefit: You can cause spells you cast to manifest with strange visual, auditory, or olfactory features that make them hard to identify. Choose a school of magic. The Spellcraft DC to identify spells you cast from that school of magic increases by 2. Onlookers who fail a Spellcraft check to identify your spell by 2 or less incorrectly identify the spell as another randomly selected spell of the same school and level

name: Magical Knack
benefit: Pick a class when you gain this traitâyour caster level in that class gains a +2 trait bonus as long as this bonus doesn’t raise your caster level above your current Hit Dice
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Magical Knack You were raised, either wholly or in part, by a magical creature, either after it found you abandoned in the woods or because your parents often left you in the care of a magical minion. This constant exposure to magic has made its mysteries easy for you to understand, even when you turn your mind to other devotions and tasks.

name: Magical Lineage
benefit: Pick one spell when you choose this trait. When you apply metamagic feats to this spell that add at least 1 level to the spell, treat its actual level as 1 lower for determining the spell’s final adjusted level. Editor’s Note Can I use this trait to adjust a spell’s effective level below the unmodified spell’s original level? No. For example, it won’t allow you to alter a wizard’s fireball into 2nd-level spell. [ Source ]
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Magical Lineage One of your parents was a gifted spellcaster who not only used metamagic often, but also developed many magical items and perhaps even a new spell or twoâand you have inherited a fragment of this greatness.

name: Magical Talent
benefit: Choose a 0-level spell. You may cast that spell once per day as a spell-like ability . This spell-like ability is cast at your highest caster level gained; if you have no caster level , it functions at CL 1st. The spell-like ability ‘s save DC is Charisma -based
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Magical Talent Either from inborn talent, the whimsy of the gods, or obsessive study of strange tomes, you have mastered the use of a cantrip.

name: Malleable Magic
benefit: Once per day as a swift action , you can lose a single 1st-, 2nd- or 3rd-level magus spell to regain 1 arcane pool point. You can’t exceed the maximum number of arcane pool points in your arcane pool by using this trait
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Malleable Magic

name: Mathematical Prodigy
benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and Knowledge (engineering) checks, and one of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Mathematical Prodigy Mathematics has always come easily for you, and you have always been able to “see the math” in the physical and magical world.

name: Meticulous Concoction
benefit: Once per day, you can either add a +2 trait bonus to the save DC for one bomb you throw or extend the duration of one extract you imbibe by 2 rounds. Extracts with an instantaneous duration are not affected by this trait
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Meticulous Concoction Your meticulous carefulness makes your bombs and extracts more potent.

name: Mutant Eye
benefit: You have a third eye on your forehead. As long as it is uncovered and open, you can get a clearer sense of the emotions of those you see, granting you a +2 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks that increases to +4 on checks to notice whether a character is under a mind-affecting effect. However, the eye is unsettling, and you take a â1 penalty on Bluff and Diplomacy checks against humanoids who can see it

name: Naturally Gifted
benefit: Wherever the truth lies, you gain an additional use of one of your gnome magic spell-like abilities each day. This does not always have to be the same spell-like ability âone day you might use dancing lights twice, only to use the additional casting for speak with animals the next day
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Naturally Gifted (Gnome) For unknown reasons, you have deeper reserves of magical energy than those around you. Perhaps you are descended from a family of powerful arcane casters, or maybe you believe this trait marks you as destined for magical greatness.

name: Outcast’s Intuition
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks, and Sense Motive is always a class skill for you. In addition, your caster level is treated as 1 level higher for the purposes of any attempts to dispel your magic
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Outcast’s Intuition You are able to sense the motives of others and use that sense to bolster your magic against dispelling.

name: Overwhelming Beauty
benefit: The DC of your mind-affecting effects increases by 1 against creatures that have at least one of the same subtypes as you

name: Partial Protege
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks and on Use Magic Device checks made to emulate a class feature
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Partial Protege You are adept at disguising your true talents.

name: Pathfinder’s Focus
benefit: You can select a magnetic compass for your arcane bond class feature; this compass is non-magical, but you can later spend 250 gp to upgrade it into a wayfinder. Choosing this trait allows you to upgrade this wayfinder to a variant or unique wayfinder per the normal rules for improving magic items. A bonded wayfinder must be held in your hand to grant the benefits of being a bonded object
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Pathfinder’s Focus

name: Perfectionist’s Brew
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Craft (alchemy) checks and on Spellcraft checks made to brew potions
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Perfectionist’s Brew You know that potion recipes should be followed with exact precision.

name: Possessed
benefit: Once per day, you can attempt a Knowledge check of your choice even if you are not trained in that skill and it is not usually possible to use that skill untrained. If you can normally use that skill untrained, you gain a +2 trait bonus on the check
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Possessed You were, or are, possessed in some way by another entity that grants you occasional access to its knowledge.

name: Pragmatic Activator
benefit: You may use your Intelligence modifier when making Use Magic Device checks instead of your Charisma modifier
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Pragmatic Activator While some figure out how to use magical devices with stubborn resolve, your approach is more pragmatic.

name: Precise Treatment
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Heal checks, and you may use your Intelligence modifier when making Heal checks instead of your Wisdom modifier
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Precise Treatment You treat others with a clear and calculating intellect.

name: Reluctant Apprentice
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) checks, and are considered trained in that skill even if you have no ranks in it
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Reluctant Apprentice Your early training grants you knowledge of the arcane.

name: Resilient Caster
benefit: Your caster level is treated as 1 level higher whenever someone attempts to dispel one of your spells
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Resilient Caster Your great force of will makes your magic harder to dispel.

name: Scorned by Magic
benefit: Reduce the caster level of spells and spell-like abilities cast upon you by 1 for the purpose of attempting dispel checks and overcoming your spell resistance (if any)

name: Second Tongue
benefit: Any summoning or divination spell you cast to summon or contact a Great Old One or one of their minions is cast at +1 caster level
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Second Tongue (Old Cults) Using an ancient and painful surgical technique, youâve reshaped your tongue. These surgical mutilations permit you to speak ancient words unpronounceable to most mortals, enhancing your ability to work magic associated with the Great Old Ones.

name: Self-Taught Scholar
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Linguistics checks to decipher unfamiliar languages, and Linguistics is always a class skill for you. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks made to decipher the writing on a scroll
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Self-Taught Scholar Being self-taught has made it necessary for you to scour all documentation you can get your hands on.

name: Shrouded Casting
benefit: Choose one school of magic when you pick this trait. You can cast spells from that school as if you had the Eschew Materials feat
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Shrouded Casting You have learned the secret to casting some spells without lesser material components.

name: Skeptic
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against illusions
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Skeptic Growing up, you were always around magical effects to the extent that you realized much of it was mere smoke and mirrors.

name: Spark of Creation
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Craft checks, and the cost of creating magic items is reduced by 5%

name: Spiritual Attachment
benefit: You gain a +4 trait bonus on checks to notice haunts, and when interacting with someone who is possessed by an incorporeal undead creature, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff , Diplomacy , Intimidate , and Sense Motive checks against that target

name: Storm-Touched
benefit: You gain DR 1/â against creatures and attacks with the electricity type
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Storm-Touched You share an affinity with elemental lightning.

name: Strength Foretold
benefit: Once per day as a free action , you gain a +1 trait bonus to the DC of the saving throw of one of your bonus bloodline spells
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Strength Foretold You can channel extra power into one of your bloodline spells.

name: Strength of the Land
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on caster level checks while touching the ground or unworked stone. This includes dispel checks and checks to overcome spell resistance
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Strength of the Land (Dwarf)

name: Sun-Blessed
benefit: Whenever you’re affected by a healing effect that would heal more hit points than your maximum hit point total, you gain the excess healing as temporary hit points . You can gain up to a number of temporary hit points per day equal to your character level in this way. These temporary hit points last for 1 minute

name: Sotto Voce
benefit: You may cast sotto voce (spell not added yet) as a spell-like ability three times per day as a spell-like ability. This spell-like ability is cast at your highest caster level; if you have no caster level, it functions at CL 1st
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Sotto Voce You have learned the secrets of sotto voce, the eerie, dry whispering voice used to pass on cult secrets.

name: Tenacious Shifting
benefit: Any transmutation spell you cast upon yourself has its duration increased by 2 rounds. Transmutation spells with an instantaneous duration are not affected by this trait
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Tenacious Shifting You’ve discovered the secret of stable transmutations

name: Theoretical Magician
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks, or a +3 bonus if you aren’t a spellcaster
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Theoretical Magician

name: Transmuter
benefit: Whenever you cast a spell from the transmutation school, its effects manifest at +1 caster level . Additionally, select one of the following transmutation spells: bear’s endurance , bull’s strength , cat’s grace , eagle’s splendor , fox’s cunning , or owl’s wisdom . Once per day when you cast that spell, its duration is doubled. A spell affected by this trait cannot be modified further by the Extend Spell metamagic feat or similar abilities

name: Trickster
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus to your caster level when determining the duration, range, and area of all spells from the illusion school
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Trickster (Gnome)

name: Twinned Presence
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you. In addition, if your eidolon is summoned and within 30 feet, and its size exceeds your own, use its size modifier on any Intimidate checks you make
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Twinned Presence Your eidolonâand your connection to itâmakes others ill at ease.

name: Twisted Tattoo
benefit: Once per day as you cast a spell whose casting time is 1 round or less, you can roll 1d4â2 (no minimum) and add the result to that spellâs effective caster level . In an area of primal magic, the minimum result of this roll is 0, not â1

name: Two-World Magic
benefit: Select one 0-level spell from a class spell list other than your own. This spell is a 0-level spell on your class spell list (or a 1st-level spell if your class doesn’t have 0-level spells). For example, if you are a druid , you could select mage hand and thereafter prepare it as a 0-level druid spell; if you are a sorcerer , you could select know direction as a 0-level sorcerer spell known
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Two-World Magic

name: Unscathed
benefit: Each type of energy resistance you have (if any) increases by 2 points
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Unscathed You are amazingly resistant to energy attacks because of either your upbringing or magical experimentation.

name: Unseen but Not Undone
benefit: Once per day, you can cast a bloodline spell as if you had the Still Spell feat. Using this trait does not modify the spell’s level
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Unseen but Not Undone Without a single gesture, you can unleash a bloodline spell.

name: Unstable Mutagen
benefit: Once per day, you can create an unstable mutagen . It is like a normal mutagen in most ways, but also gains a single benefit or hindrance due to its instability. Roll 1d6 to determine the result of the instability. d6 Result 1 The unstable mutagen lasts for 5 minutes per alchemist level. 2 The unstable mutagen lasts for 20 minutes per alchemist level. 3 The unstable mutagen does not grant a natural armor bonus . 4 The natural armor bonus granted by the mutagen increases by 2. 5 The penalty that the mutagen applies to the corresponding mental ability score increases by 2. 6 The unstable mutagen does not apply a penalty to the corresponding mental ability score
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Unstable Mutagen You discovered or were given a secret to make your mutagens more unstableâbut also more potent.

name: Volatile Conduit
benefit: Once per day as a free action , when you cast a spell that deals acid, cold, electricity, or fire damage, you can enhance that spell with volatile energy. When you do, it deals 1d4 points of extra damage of the same energy type
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Volatile Conduit You discovered a secret that enhances the energy of some spells.

name: Water-Touched
benefit: You gain DR 1/â against creatures and attacks with the water type
description: Home > Traits > Magic Traits > Water-Touched You share an affinity with elemental water.

name: Winter Survivor
benefit: You gain cold resistance 5 against the first cold damage you take each day, and gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against the fear effects of creatures with the cold subtype

name: Race Traits
benefit: gained by your racial trait persistâ only if your mind and memories change as well do you lose the benefits of a race trait. Of course, in such an event, youâre also likely to lose skills, feats, and a whole lot more! These race traits are available to all characters of the race in parenthesis in the traits name. If no race is listed then it is intended for Humans. Members of any race can select a bloodline race trait, as they represent distant bloodlines intermixed with or corrupting those your race. name: Adaptable Flatterer
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks and on attack rolls against opponents who are denied their Dexterity bonus to AC against you

name: Adrift
benefit: You receive a +1 trait bonus on saving throws made to resist charm and compulsion effects
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Adrift (Aasimar) You never felt like you belonged in your family. You were different, an outsider, and you grew up unable to bond with the people around you. Now, as an adult, you are still a little odd and others have a hard time understanding what makes you tick.

name: Adroit
benefit: If one of your hands is free and your base attack bonus is +1 or higher, you can draw a weapon as a free action combined with any move action including move actions to direct spells, manipulate items, stand up, and so on)

name: Advantageous Distraction
benefit: Once per day as a swift action , you can be momentarily distracted in combatâducking an axe swing to inspect a toadstool, or stooping behind a tree to lick some bark and accidentally avoiding an arrow, and so on. When you activate this ability, you gain a +2 dodge bonus to your AC for 1 round
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Advantageous Distraction (Goblin) Like most goblins, youâre easily distracted. Unlike most goblins, though, you have a knack for being distracted at the right time, especially when it comes to avoiding pain.

name: Adventurous Explorer
benefit: When frightened or shaken , you only take a -1 penalty on your rolls instead of -2
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Adventurous Explorer

name: Aerial Observer
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Perception checks while you are at least 30 feet above ground level

name: Alchemical Breath
benefit: As a member of a green kobold tribe, you begin play with three pieces of the choking smoke variety of alchemical coal. Eating one of these pellets allows you to exhale noxious vapors, damaging and sickening your enemies. These pellets do not count against your starting character wealth
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Alchemical Breath (Kobold, Green-Scaled) Your tribe, in an effort to emulate the green chromatic dragons they admire, goes to great lengths to secure alchemical coal.

name: Almost Human
benefit: You gain a + 4 trait bonus on Disguise checks to pass as human , and Disguise is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Almost Human (Half-Orc) You have enough human features that it’s easy for you to pass for a pureblooded human.

name: Among Humans
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Disguise checks to appear human while assuming your specific human form with the change shape racial trait, and Disguise is always a class skill for you

name: Animal Friend
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saving throws as long as an animal (Tiny or larger, must be at least indifferent toward you) is within 30 feet, and Handle Animal is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Animal Friend (Gnome) You’ve long been a friend to animals, and feel safer when animals are nearby.

name: Animalistic Affliction
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Handle Animal and wild empathy checks

name: Anticipate Evil
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on opposed Dexterity -based skill checks against outsiders with the evil subtype. In addition, when your initiative is tied with such creatures, you always act first regardless of which of you has a higher initiative modifier

name: Arcane Dabbler
benefit: Choose a 0-level arcane spell. You may cast that spell once per day as a spell-like ability. Your caster level is equal to your highest class level in a spellcasting class; if you have no caster level, it functions at CL 1st. The spell-like abilityâs save DC is Intelligence – or Charisma -based (chosen when you select this trait)
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Arcane Dabbler (Elf)

name: Arcane Prodigy
prerequisites: Drow; Drow Benefit(s) Once per day as an immediate action , you can double the duration of one of your racial spell-like abilities , as if using the Extend Spell metamagic feat
benefit: Once per day as an immediate action , you can double the duration of one of your racial spell-like abilities , as if using the Extend Spell metamagic feat

name: Arcane Student
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and Spellcraft checks, and you may make these checks untrained

name: Arms Master
benefit: You take a â2 penalty on attack rolls made with weapons with which you are not proficient instead of the normal â4

name: Artistic Dilettante
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Appraise checks, and on checks for one Craft skill of your choice

name: Aspiring Bard
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus to one category of Perform checks and a +2 trait bonus to any Knowledge (local) checks that deal with the local music scene
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Aspiring Bard (Human)

name: Assimilated Native
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks to influence natives, but you suffer a -2 on Diplomacy checks to influence them
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Assimilated Native

name: Auspicious Tattoo
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saving throws

name: Balloon Headed
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Perception checks, and Perception is always a class skill for you. Any Escape Artist checks that requires you to squeeze your head through a tight space take a â8 penalty
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Balloon Headed (Goblin) Your head is particularly wide and large, even for a goblin.

name: Bauble Fascination
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Use Magic Device checks, and Use Magic Device is always a class skill for you

name: Beast Bully
benefit: You can make an Intimidate check instead of a Handle Animal check when trying to handle or push an animal

name: Bent Body
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus to CMD when resisting grapple attempts

name: Big Boned
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on combat maneuver checks made to overrun opponents, as well as a +1 trait bonus to your CMD against trip attempts

name: Big Ears
benefit: While this might not quite be the case, you gain a +2 bonus on all Perception checks made to hear noises. Additionally, you can hear noises that normally only dogs or other animals can hear, like the sound of a dog whistle
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Big Ears (Goblin) Your massive ears are your pride and joy, and other goblins claim you can hear a flea scream as it falls off a goblin dog .

name: Bitter Heart
prerequisites: Changeling; Changeling You share a sliver of your mother’s supernatural hatred
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus to confirm critical hits. Get this book AND support this site!

name: Blade Bravado
benefit: When wielding a one-handed weapon and nothing in your off hand, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Acrobatics and Bluff checks

name: Blessing of Darkness
benefit: Whenever a spellcaster capable of channeling negative energy casts a beneficial spell on you, she acts as if she were one level higher for the purpose of determining that spellâs effects

name: Blood Algorithm
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against spells with the pain descriptor . Additionally, once per day when you are healed by a spell that targets constructs (such as a make whole spell), you heal 1 extra hit point per level of the spell

name: Blood of Dragons
benefit: Choose one of the following: gain a +1 trait bonus on Perception checks, gain low-light vision , or gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against effects that cause sleep or paralysis
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Blood of Dragons Long ago, your ancestors’ blood mixed with that of dragons.

name: Blood Stalker
benefit: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Survival checks made to track or follow a trail so long as you have dealt damage to the creature you are hunting within the last week

name: Boar Resilience
prerequisites: Wereboar-kin; Wereboar-kin Benefit(s) You are unimpaired by being at exactly 0 hit points
benefit: You are unimpaired by being at exactly 0 hit points . In addition, you can ignore the Endurance prerequisite for the Diehard feat

name: Bog Scamp
benefit: You can swim through a deep bog at up to half your speed as a move action , instead of the normal quarter speed. Failing a swim check while in a deep bog doesn’t cause you to go underwater, even if you fail by 5 or more, though such a failure still results in a lack of progress
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Bog Scamp (Kobold, Black-Scaled) You were raised in the sludgy swamps, and are used to moving through boggy terrain.

name: Born Damned
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against curses and magical effects that produce curses. Editor’s Note The publisher didn’t say to but since they created a curse descriptor , why not use it? If doing so, change the “Benefit” line to: Benefit You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against spells and effects that have the [ curse ] descriptor
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Born Damned (Tiefling) The inherent sacrilege that taints your soul sometimes crowds out lesser banes.

name: Born in the Light
benefit: You gain a +2 bonus on checks and saves affected by the Endurance feat (this bonus does not stack with the bonus granted by the Endurance feat). When your light sensitivity causes you to become dazzled, you do not take the â1 penalty on sight-based Perception checks
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Born in the Light (Dhampir) The circumstance of your birth and upbringing left little room to accommodate your weaknesses, and many hours toiling in broad daylight have decreased the severity of your innate hindrances.

name: Born to the Water
benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on Swim checks and only need to make Swim checks once every 2 hours to avoid fatigue , instead of once each hour
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Born to the Water

name: Bouncy
benefit: Whenever you take falling damage, the first 1d6 points of lethal damage suffered in the fall are automatically converted to nonlethal damage . You also gain a +2 trait bonus on all Reflex saves made to avoid unexpected falls
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Bouncy (Goblin) Your bones, flesh, and skin are a bit more elastic than those of most goblinsâwhen you fall, you tend to bounce a little better as a result.

name: Bralani’s Step
benefit: Once per day, you may move an additional 5 feet as part of a move action
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Bralani’s Step (Aasimar) Your ancestor was a bralani, an azata known for its untamed speed in battle. When in combat, you feel a fierce surge of energy through your limbs.

name: Businessman
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Craft (alchemy) checks
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Businessman (Gnome)

name: Bred for War
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks and a +1 trait bonus on your CMB because of your great size. You must be at least 6 feet tall

name: Brewmaster
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Profession (brewer) and Craft (alchemy) checks, but you take a â1 penalty on Diplomacy checks made to change the attitude of dwarves who know that your family has shared brewing secrets with non-dwarves
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Brewmaster (Dwarf) Your family brought the secrets of dwarven brewing to non-dwarven lands. Though this has given you skill in the brewer’s craft, it’s also earned you distrust among dwarven purists.

name: Brute
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Brute (Half-Orc) You have worked for a crime lord, either as a low-level enforcer or as a guard, and are adept at frightening away people.

name: Buried Anxiety
benefit: Pick a specific sort of object, color, sound, or similar relatively common phenomena. You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws made to resist fear effects except when you can see, hear, smell, or taste that which unnerves you

name: Burnished Skin
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on saving throws made to disbelieve illusions
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Burnished Skin (Aasimar) Sometime during your adolescence, you suffered severe burns in a devastating fire. Along with your scars, you developed the uncanny ability to tell what is and isn’t real.

name: Business Venturer
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Appraise , Knowledge (local), and Profession (merchant) checks, and one of these skills (your choice) is a class skill for you

name: Canopy Prowler
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Climb checks, and Climb is always a class skill for you. If you possess the climber racial trait, you also gain a +1 trait bonus on Stealth checks while climbing

name: Caravan Drover
benefit: You treat whips as martial weapons, and up to 10 animals and humanoids traveling with you can hustle or make a forced march for 1 hour longer than normal before taking nonlethal damage and becoming fatigued

name: Carefully Hidden
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus to Will saves and a +2 trait bonus to saving throws versus divination effects
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Carefully Hidden (Human) Your life as a member of an unpopular ethnic group has given you an uncanny knack for avoiding detection.

name: Carnation Scales
benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on Survival checks, and Survival is always a class skill for you. Most kobolds with carnation scales also have the day raider alternate racial trait
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Carnation Scales (Kobold) Though your light pink scales made you the subject of ridicule by your tribe, you can adapt to more environments than they can.

name: Celestial Community
benefit: You may expend your once per day spell-like ability to spontaneously cast cure light wounds (CL equal to your character level), but doing so is draining and you take an amount of nonlethal damage equal to half the number of hit points you heal

name: Celestial Tracker
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks made to follow tracks. In addition, you treat trails as being up to 24 hours fresher than they actually are when using the Survival skill to follow tracks
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Celestial Tracker (Aasimar) You share the same talent for tracking evildoers that your angelic ancestor possessed.

name: Cellular Match
benefit: Whenever you are affected by a polymorph spell or effect, your nanites adjust completely at a molecular level. For the duration of the polymorph effect, you are treated as only a humanoid for the purpose of effects that target creatures by type. For example, a ranger’s favored enemy bonus against constructs wouldnât apply to you while you are polymorphed, but nor would spells such as make whole . This trait modifies part of the androidâs constructed racial trait, but otherwise that trait is unchanged (a polymorphed android still canât gain morale bonuses, is still immune to fear, and so on)

name: Cellular Match
benefit: Whenever you are affected by a polymorph spell or effect, your nanites adjust completely at a molecular level. For the duration of the polymorph effect, you are treated as only a humanoid for the purpose of effects that target creatures by type. For example, a ranger’s favored enemy bonus against constructs wouldn’t apply to you while you are polymorphed, but nor would spells such as make whole . This trait modifies part of the android’s constructed racial trait, but otherwise that trait is unchanged a polymorphed android still can’t gain morale bonuses, is still immune to fear , and so on)

name: Centaur Vengeance
benefit: You gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against any dragon’s frightful presence
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Centaur Vengeance (Centaur) Your nomadic tribe wanders in constant fear of a great white wyrm and feel helpless to stop the dragon’s aggression. Your tribe is filled with wise sages and great warriors, and they resent being cowed by any foe. You vowed that one day you would not have to be afraid any longer.

name: Chain Master
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on combat maneuver checks made to trip opponents with a spiked chain or whip

name: Clearheaded
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on opposed checks against the Bluff and Disguise skills and a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against illusion effects
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Clearheaded (Dwarf)

name: Clergy Member
benefit: You receive a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks when interacting with ordained members of your religion, and once per week you can request aid from a temple of your faith. The GM has final say in what sort of aid you can reasonably request, but in general you may ask for the casting of a 1st-level spell or for a non-magical item worth 50 gp or less
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Clergy Member (Aasimar) You belong to a particular faith, and your religious leaders see you as a mortal aspect of their deity. You are treated with respect and graciousness whenever you visit a temple of your faith.

name: Cold Fortitude
benefit: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws against nonlethal cold damage
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Cold Fortitude (Kobold, White-Scaled) The perpetually chilly environment of your youth made you exceptionally resilient in arctic climes.

name: Colonial Entitlement
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks against primitives
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Colonial Entitlement

name: Colonial Sympathizer
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Diplomacy checks involving colonials and others with this trait
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Colonial Sympathizer

name: Color Thief
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Stealth checks, providing you wear only light armor or no armor
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Color Thief (Goblin) Your skin is an odd tint that somehow absorbs background colors. Maybe because your mother drank a lot of potions when you were still inside her belly. Maybe because youâve been blessed by the barghests . Maybe because youâre just better than the other boring goblins.

name: Creative Manipulator
benefit: Once per day, you may reroll a Charisma check you just made. You must take the result of the second roll, even if it is worse

name: Creative Reality
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, which increases to +5 when attempting to convince someone an honest answer is a falsehood. Get this book AND support this site!

name: Crocodile Swim
prerequisites: Werecrocodile-kin; Werecrocodile-kin Benefit(s) You gain a +2 trait bonus on Swim and Stealth checks while moving at half speed or less and mostly or completely underwater
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Swim and Stealth checks while moving at half speed or less and mostly or completely underwater. One of these skills (your choice) becomes a class skill for you

name: Cruel Rager
prerequisites: Half-orc; Half-orc Benefit(s) If you successfully confirm a critical hit against an enemy while raging , you regain 1 round of rage
benefit: If you successfully confirm a critical hit against an enemy while raging , you regain 1 round of rage. This can occur only once per rage

name: Curse in the Blood
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against curses. You treat your caster level as 1 higher when casting spells and spell-like abilities with the curse descriptor

name: Dark Magic Affinity
benefit: Whenever you cast a spell with the [ evil ] descriptor, you act as if you were one level higher for the purpose of determining that spellâs effects

name: Deadly Rush
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on critical hit confirmation rolls made as part of a charge

name: Deathâs Deputy
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on the damage dealt for any attack that would already reduce your target to negative hit points without this trait

name: Deathkeeper
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against the supernatural abilities of undead creatures

name: Deathtouched
benefit: You gain either a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saving throws or a +2 trait bonus on saving throws against mind-affecting effects (your choice)
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Deathtouched (Bloodline) At some point you were tainted with the corruption of the undead, and you have gained some of their defenses.

name: Deep Marker
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks, and a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against fear effects
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Deep Marker (Dwarf)

name: Destined Pioneer
benefit: Choose a terrain from the ranger’s list of favored terrains. Once selected, this choice cannot be changed. Once per day while in the selected terrain, you may move across non-magical difficult terrain as though it were not difficult terrain until the end of your turn

name: Dilettante Artist
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus to one category of Perform checks and a +1 trait bonus to Diplomacy checks. One of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Dilettante Artist (Elf) Art for you is a social gateway and you use it to influence and penetrate high society.

name: Divine the Mystery
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (engineering) checks to identify creatures with the robot subtype and relics of technology. When using Bluff to feint against an intelligent construct , you do not take a penalty for feinting against a non- humanoid . Get this book AND support this site!

name: Dog-Sniff-Hate
benefit: You gain the scent special quality but only against canine creatures, like dogs or wolves, including monstrous hounds such as hell hounds , yeth hounds , and even werewolves . You gain a +2 trait bonus on attack rolls against dogs you can smell
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Dog-Sniff-Hate (Goblin)

name: Dowsing
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks. Whenever you succeed at a Survival check to follow tracks in desert terrain, you can always tell how long ago the tracks were made (though supernatural abilities and spells still impede this ability as appropriate)

name: Draconic Echo
benefit: You are able to cast ghost sound twice per day as a spell-like ability . The caster level for this effect is equal to your character level. This spell-like ability’s save DC is Intelligence -based
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Draconic Echo (Kobold, Blue-Scaled) Like the blue dragons your tribe reveres, you have a touch of illusory magic.

name: Draconic Lineage
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against fear and against any effect created by a creature of the dragon type. If you gain a bloodrager or sorcerer bloodline , you must choose draconic

name: Dualborn
benefit: You gain racial energy resistance only to the energy types you choose, and not to others. When using your elemental assault ability, you can only sheath your arms in the energy types selected, but you can choose to sheath your primary hand with one of the selected energy types and your off-hand with the other. Attacks made with each hand (or a weapon held in each hand) deal bonus energy damage of the selected type. While wielding a two-handed weapon, half of the bonus energy damage is one energy type and half is the other

name: Durable Change
prerequisites: Werebear-kin; Werebear-kin Benefit(s) When you use your change shape ability, you can choose to gain the benefits of the Endurance feat rather than gaining a special ability
benefit: When you use your change shape ability, you can choose to gain the benefits of the Endurance feat rather than gaining a special ability

name: Earthsense
benefit: As a swift action , you can gain tremorsense to a range of 60 feet until the beginning of your next turn. You can use this ability once per day at 1st level, plus one additional time per day at 5th level and every 5 levels thereafter, to a maximum of five times per day at 20th level

name: Elaborate Trapper
benefit: When creating a trap , if your Craft ( trap ) roll exceeds the DC of the check by 5 or more, that trap’s Disable Device DC increases by 2
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Elaborate Trapper (Kobold, Blue-Scaled) You’re blessed with a devious mind, and the more elaborate your traps are, the more effective they become.

name: Elven Reflexes
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on initiative checks
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Elven Reflexes (Half-Elf) One of your parents was a member of a wild elven tribe, and you’ve inherited a portion of your elven parent’s quick reflexes.

name: Elven Serenity
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Handle Animal checks to calm other creatures. You need not speak the same language to attempt a Diplomacy check in this manner

name: Enduring Heritage
prerequisites: Tiefling; Tiefling Benefit(s) You can channel your evil ancestry to take advantage of any effects for which such an identity would matter (such as detect evil )
benefit: You can channel your evil ancestry to take advantage of any effects for which such an identity would matter (such as detect evil ). You detect as an evil outsider with the same number of HD as you possess. You can begin or end this effect as a swift action . You can maintain this effect for a number of rounds per day equal to your HD

name: Enlightened Warrior
benefit: You may take levels in monk even while maintaining a neutral or neutral good alignment
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Enlightened Warrior (Aasimar) You have always found it easy to maintain inner peace and enlightenment that translate well to the battlefield.

name: Ethical Leader
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus to your Leadership score if all your cohorts and followers have an alignment within one step of your alignment
description: Home > Traits > Race Traits > Ethical Leader (Aasimar) You attract followers who agree with your philosophical outlook on life. Your followers and cohorts are more willing to serve you because of their confidence in your strong moral position.

name: Ever Home
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (geography) and Sleight of Hand checks

name: Ever Wary
