benefit: Choose one Knowledge skill. You can always choose to take 10 on checks with the chosen Knowledge skill, even when distracted or threatened

name: Balanced Determination
benefit: Once per day, before attempting a saving throw against a spell ability originating from another creature, you can invoke the determination of those dragons . You take 10 on the saving throw (treat the d20 die result as if it were a 10)

name: Bastard
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks, and Sense Motive is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Bastard You were born out of wedlock. You have always been an outsider in society, and in your own family. This perspective has sharpened your insight.

name: Beast Bond
benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on Handle Animal checks and Ride checks. One of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Beast Bond You share a close bond with animals.

name: Beastkin
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks and can use speak with animals as a spell-like ability at will to communicate with the type of animal that raised you

name: Bruising Intellect
benefit: Intimidate is always a class skill for you, and you may use your Intelligence modifier when making Intimidate checks instead of your Charisma modifier
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Bruising Intellect Your sharp intellect and rapier-like wit bruise egos.

name: Bully
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Bully You grew up in an environment where the meek were ignored and you often had to resort to threats or violence to be heard.

name: Gnomish Alchemist
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Craft (alchemy) checks
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Gnomish Alchemist

name: Calculated Bribe
benefit: Once per day while haggling with a merchant or striking a bargain with another intelligent creature, you can spend a number of gold pieces equal to your level Ã 10 in order to reroll a Diplomacy check you just made, before the results are revealed. You must take the result of the reroll, even if it’s worse than the original roll. In addition, you begin play with a set of extravagant noble’s clothes worth 100 gp
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Calculated Bribe If you follow this code, you are keenly aware of the value of actions as well as goods.
source: Knights of the Inner Sea Â

name: Canter
benefit: Anyone who attempts to use Bluff to deliver a secret message to you gains a +5 bonus on her Bluff check. When you attempt to intercept a secret message using Sense Motive , you gain a +5 trait bonus on the attempt
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Canter You grew up among thieves and scoundrels, and their unusual speech patterns and turns of phrase don’t faze you in the slightest.

name: Charming
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus when you use Bluff or Diplomacy on a character that is (or could be) sexually attracted to you, and a +1 trait bonus to the save DC of any language-dependent spell you cast on such characters or creatures
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Charming Blessed with good looks, you’ve come to depend on the fact that others find you attractive.

name: Child of the Streets
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sleight of Hand checks, and Sleight of Hand is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Child of the Streets You grew up on the streets of a large city, and as a result you have developed a knack for picking pockets and hiding small objects on your person.

name: Chip on the Shoulder
benefit: Whenever a creature fails an Intimidate check against you, you gain a +2 trait bonus on your next Intimidate check against that creature and Intimidate is a class skill for you

name: Civilized
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nobility) checks and Knowledge (local) checks. Knowledge (local) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Civilized You are well versed in the local laws, customs, and politics.

name: Clever Wordplay
benefit: Choose one Charisma -based skill. You attempt checks with that skill using your Intelligence modifier instead of your Charisma modifier
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Clever Wordplay Your cunning and logic are more than a match for another’s confidence and poise.

name: Collector
benefit: Select one of the following skills: Craft (any one) Disable Device Escape Artist Perform (any one) Spellcraft Whenever you have your collection within 5 feet of you, you gain a +2 trait bonus on all checks made with the selected skill. Once this skill has been selected, it cannot be changed, nor can you gain it for any other collection you begin amassing
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Collector (Gnome)

name: Competitive
benefit: Whenever another creature within 30 feet attempts a skill check and you attempt a check with the same skill before the start of that creature’s next turn, you gain a +1 trait bonus on your check (this includes attempting an opposed skill check against the creature)

name: Contagious Mettle
benefit: If you follow this code, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saves against fear. In addition, any allies adjacent to you receive a +1 morale bonus on Will saves against fear
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Contagious Mettle
source: Knights of the Inner Sea Â

name: Convincing Liar
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff or Intimidate checks and one of these skills (your choice) is a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Convincing Liar You’ve spent your life perfecting the art of half-truths in order to accomplish what you need to.

name: Criminal
benefit: Select one of the following skills: Disable Device , Intimidate , or Sleight of Hand . You gain a +1 trait bonus on that skill, and it is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Criminal You spent your early life robbing and stealing to get by.

name: Cutting Condescension
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks to force a creature to act friendly towards you, and can attempt such checks in half the normal time

name: Cynical Ear
benefit: Add 2 when determining your Hit Dice for Intimidate checks, and increase the DC or all Diplomacy checks against you by 2

name: Destined Diplomat
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks toward outsiders , and Diplomacy is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Destined Diplomat Your relationship with your eidolon gives you some clout with other outsiders.

name: Detect Disobedience
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks to detect when an underling is trying to hide something from you, and can attempt such checks instead of Perception checks to notice and react to a subordinate’s surprise attack against you

name: Dismantle Order
benefit: Once per day, you can use detect law as a spell-like ability ( caster level 1st). If you have levels in a class that can cast detect law , your caster level for this spell-like ability is equal to that class level
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Dismantle Order If you follow this code, your appreciation for unfettered social freedom allows you to locate supporters of law with supernatural ease.
source: Knights of the Inner Sea Â

name: Doublespeak
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks to pass along secret messages

name: Draconic Destiny
benefit: When dying , you gain a +2 trait bonus on Constitution checks to become stable . In addition, you die from hit point loss only once your hit points equal or exceed a negative amount equal to your Constitution score + 2

name: Dragon-Hunted
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Will saves against fear effects, and against any saving throw from a spell or effect created by a dragon

name: Dragon Pact
benefit: Choose one category of true dragon (chromatic, metallic, primal, etc.). You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks against that category of dragon and a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks against all creatures of the dragon type that are not of the same category of true dragon

name: Drake Anatomist
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on damage rolls against creatures with the dragon creature type, and a +2 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) checks to identify dragons and their special powers and vulnerabilities

name: Drake-Trained
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Perception checks, and a +1 trait bonus on skill checks attempted as part of trying to influence a dragon

name: Elemental Negotiator
benefit: Â At character creation, you learn one of the following languages as a bonus language: Aquan, Auran, Ignan, or Terran. Additionally, your options for bonus languages from having a high Intelligence score include the other three elemental languages, in addition to those language options allowed by your race and class. You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Bluff checks when using one of these languages to communicate with a creature originating from the language’s corresponding Elemental Planes

name: Enemy of Slavers
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks made to sway the minds of slavers and anyone who otherwise keeps innocent people against their will
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Enemy of Slavers If you follow this code, you are known to be single-minded with regard to slavery, and this fervent belief is easily perceived by others. Those who deal in flesh have a greater desire to appease you before matters escalate to confrontation, knowing that your wrath will be unwavering and swift.
source: Knights of the Inner Sea Â

name: Etymologist
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Linguistics checks, know one additional bonus language, and treat Linguistics as a class skill
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Etymologist (Gnome)

name: Explorer
benefit: At the beginning of each character level, select one desired terrain type from the following list: cold desert forest jungle mountains (including hills) plains planes (other than the Material Plane) swamp underground (including caves and dungeons) urban water You gain a +2 bonus on all Survival checks made in your desired terrain type. At the beginning of each level, you must select a new desired terrain type to replace the old one (you cannot take the same desired terrain type two levels in a row)
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Explorer (Gnome)

name: Fast-Talker
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, and Bluff is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Fast-Talker You had a knack for getting yourself into trouble as a child, and as a result developed a silver tongue at an early age.

name: Feral Speech
benefit: You gain one of the following languages of your choice as a bonus language: Aklo, Aquan, Auran, Giant, Ignan, or Sylvan. With your GM’s permission, you can instead select Druidic, but druids are protective of their languageâyou are likely to find yourself hunted by druids wishing to eliminate you as a threat to their sole ownership of their secrets

name: Free Spirit
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against language-dependent and effects with the sonic descriptor . In addition, the DC to Intimidate you increases by 2

name: Friend in Every Town
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Knowledge (local) checks and Diplomacy checks. One of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Friend in Every Town You have no problem making friends and learning information from them wherever you go.

name: Friends in High Places
benefit: Whenever you are in an area in which you have used the Diplomacy skill to gather information, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks. This bonus increases to +2 when dealing with government officials

name: Friends in Low Places
benefit: Gathering information in lower quarters, such as vice dens and poorer districts, takes you 1d2 hours (instead of 1d4 hours). In addition, the attitudes of any destitute or impoverished NPCs you interact with begin one step closer to helpful

name: Fury of the Red
benefit: If you ever take a class that requires you to select a draconic heritage, you must select a red dragon as your type. After successfully completing a charge attack, you gain a +2 trait bonus on Will saves for a full round

name: Gesture Expertise
benefit: You can use a sign language or gestural system to send complex messages quickly in combat, and with a successful DC 15 Linguistics check, you can express yourself clearly enough to communicate basic messages to people who do not understand your gestures. You gain a +2 trait bonus to send secret messages via gestures using the Bluff skill, and to understand gestures with the Linguistics skill. Get this book AND support this site!

name: Gregarious
benefit: Once per day, when you attempt a Diplomacy check to improve a creature’s attitude toward you, you may choose to reroll the check after the first roll is made but before the results are revealed. You must take the second result, even if it is worse

name: Grief-Filled
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all saving throws against emotion spells and effects
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Grief-Filled You are no stranger to loss and intense emotions.

name: Grim Optimism
benefit: As a standard action , you can joke about a troublesome situation to lighten the load of dealing with it for yourself and others. You and all allies within 30 feet who can hear you gain a +2 morale bonus on saving throws against fear and pain effects for 1d4 rounds. A character cannot benefit from this effect more than once in 24 hours

name: Hardly a Fool
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks and a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against illusion effects

name: Harvester
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Profession (tanner) or Profession ( trapper ) checks, and you may make these checks as if you were trained in the skill even if you have no ranks. Additionally, you do not risk poisoning yourself whenever you handle or apply poison taken from a venomous creature
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Harvester You were trained to harvest all parts of an animal with care and precision.

name: Hell Knight Ancestry
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks to influence Hell Knights and a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks to influence enemies of the Hell Knights
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Hell Knight Ancestry

name: Hunter’s Blood
benefit: You earn a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy when used to gather information, Knowledge (religion), and Survival when used for tracking when related to an undead quarry. Choose one as these as a class skill. The undead have a +1 bonus on any roll to learn about you, as your familyâs fame precedes you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Hunter’s Blood

name: Imposing Scion
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Intimidate checks. If your bloodline is keyed to a specific creature type, your trait bonus increases to +2 when interacting with creatures of that type
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Imposing Scion The reputation of your bloodline grants you a degree of fearful respect.

name: Inexorable Authority
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Intimidate checks when enforcing or pronouncing a lawful judgment that you’re legitimately deputed to enforce or pronounce

name: Influence
benefit: Choose one of the following skills: Diplomacy , Intimidate , or Sense Motive . You gain a +1 trait bonus on that skill, and it is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Influence Your position in society grants you special insight into others, and special consideration or outright awe from others.

name: Keen Ear
benefit: You can always take 10 on Perception checks, even when stress and distractions would normally prevent you from doing so

name: King in Waiting
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saves to resist curses and spells with the curse descriptor and a +3 trait bonus on saves to resist curses originating from a linnorm

name: Knowing the Enemy
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks with the Knowledge skill corresponding to your first favored enemy choice, and that Knowledge skill is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Knowing the Enemy You know a good deal about your most dire enemies.

name: Law Enforcer
benefit: You receive a +2 bonus on Sense Motive checks to gain a hunch from social situations, and begin play with a pair of masterwork manacles
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Law Enforcer If you follow this code, you are always alert to those who transgress against the laws of civilization.
source: Knights of the Inner Sea Â

name: Life of Toil
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Life of Toil You have lived a physically taxing life, working long hours for a master or to support a trade. Hard physical labor has toughened your body and mind.

name: Lost Nobility
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on attack and damage rolls against government officials of your homeland
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Lost Nobility

name: Maestro of the Society
prerequisites: Bard, Society; You must have the bardic performance class feature
benefit: You may use bardic performance 3 additional rounds per day
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Maestro of the Society (Bard, Society) The skills of the greatest musicians are at your fingertips, thanks to the vast treasure trove of musical knowledge in the vaults you have access to.

name: Marked by Unknown Forces
benefit: You may cast light three times per day as a spell-like ability , but this ability only targets the palm of your hand, and it manifests as a glowing sigil representing your ominous birthâa holy or unholy symbol, a demonic symbol, or perhaps some other distinctive marking established by you and your GM. Those who recognize this symbol have a starting attitude toward you of one step closer to friendly (if they are followers of or scholars studying the sign) or one step closer to hostile (if they are opposed to the sign or its followers)

name: Mediator
benefit: You receive a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks. In addition, you receive a +1 trait bonus to the DC of any charm or compulsion effect that does not provide ongoing control and results in peaceful acts, such as calm emotions , sleep , or a suggestion to lay down arms

name: Memorable
benefit: When you modify a character’s attitude with the Diplomacy or Intimidate skill, the attitude change lasts 1-1/2 times longer than it otherwise would. Whenever you create a fear or mind-affecting effect that imposes a penalty or bonus with a duration of at least 2 rounds, it lasts 1 additional round after it would normally end. For example, if you demoralize a foe with an Intimidate check and beat the DC by 5, the victim is shaken for 3 rounds instead of the usual 2 rounds

name: Mentored
benefit: Choose a single Craft , Perform , or Profession skill. You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks with that skill. You also gain a +1 trait bonus when you aid another ‘s skill check with any skill
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Mentored A tutor or private instructor guided you in learning your art, profession, or trade, and through your education, you became capable of teaching and guiding others.

name: Mercenary
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy , Intimidate , and Sense Motive checks made while negotiating payment for a quest or a service that you provide
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Mercenary For everything there is a price, and you are a negotiator at heart.

name: Merchant
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on any Appraise and Sense Motive checks you attempt while bargaining for the price of goods. Appraise is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Merchant You lived your life as a merchant, buying and selling goods.

name: Mock Gladiator
benefit: You take no penalty on attack rolls when dealing nonlethal damage with that weapon, and once per day if you score a critical hit with the weapon, you can immediately attempt an Intimidate check to demoralize your target

name: Natural-Born Leader
benefit: All cohorts, followers, or summoned creatures under your leadership gain a +1 morale bonus on Will saves to avoid mind-affecting effects. If you ever take the Leadership feat, you gain a +1 trait bonus to your Leadership score
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Natural-Born Leader You’ve always found yourself in positions where others look up to you as a leader, and you can distinctly remember an event from your early childhood where you led several other children to accomplish a goal that each of you individually could not.

name: Noble Savage
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Perform checks when dealing with people of high social standing
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Noble Savage You hail from the fringes of civilization or the bottommost strata of society, but something in your character makes that seem endearing.

name: Nonchalant Thuggery
benefit: You gain a +4 trait bonus on Bluff checks to keep others from noticing your aggressive actions
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Nonchalant Thuggery

name: Ordinary
benefit: You gain a + 4 trait bonus on Stealth checks whenever you attempt to hide in a crowd
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Ordinary The only thing extraordinary about your appearance is its ordinariness. You carry yourself in an understated way, and many people who see your face soon forget it.

name: Orphaned
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks, and Survival is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Orphaned You grew up separated from your birth parents, and had to learn to watch out for yourself.

name: Pack Savvy
benefit: You gain a +3 trait bonus on Charisma -based skill checks when dealing with gnolls

name: Passionate Inertia
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Will saves to resist having your mind changed about something, but you take a â1 penalty on Will saves to resist temptation and compulsions you might reasonably be already inclined toward

name: Poverty-Stricken
benefit: You gain a +1 bonus on Survival checks, and Survival is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Poverty-Stricken Your childhood was tough, and your parents always had to make every copper piece count. Hunger was your constant companion, and you often had to live off the land or sleep in the wild.

name: Practiced Disruptor
benefit: You can attempt Knowledge (arcana) checks untrained; if you have ranks in that skill, you instead gain a +1 trait bonus on those checks. The concentration DC to cast a spell defensively in your threatened area increases by 1

name: Prince/Princess
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus to Diplomacy and Intimidate checks, and one of these skills (your choice) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Prince/Princess

name: Relic-Proof
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against effects produced by spell completion and spell trigger items
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Relic-Proof Your experimentsâboth your successes and failuresâhave inured you to the effects of stored magic.

name: Rest for the Wicked
benefit: You heal temporary ability damage at a rate of 3 points per day of complete bed rest. A normal night of rest (8 hours) still heals you at a rate of only 1 point of temporary ability damage per night of rest

name: Rich Parents
benefit: to your initial finances. Benefit : Your starting wealth increases to 900 gp
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Rich Parents You were born into a rich family, perhaps even the nobility, and even though you turned to a life of adventure, you enjoy a one-time benefit to your initial finances.

name: Rugged Dragon Hunter
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Survival checks to track dragons . If you have the favored terrain class ability, add a +1 bonus to check for skills affected by this ability, as long as youâre using these skills in regards to a dragon

name: Savage
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) checks and a +1 trait bonus on Survival checks to get along in the wild. Knowledge (nature) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Savage You were born and raised in untamed lands far from civilization. You learned to survive in the elements among brutal humanoids and beasts.

name: Savant
benefit: Choose a performance type. You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Perform checks made using that performance type. Perform is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Savant From a very young age, the ability to master performance types has come quite naturally to you.

name: Seafaring Reputation
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks against sailors and residents of regions that know of your crew or ship

name: Secret-Keeper
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks and a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against divinations , domination effects, and effects that would compel you to speak the truth

name: Seeker
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Perception checks, and Perception is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Seeker You are always on the lookout for reward and danger.

name: Self-Reliant
benefit: When attempting Craft checks, you take no penalty when using improvised tools. At the GM’s discretion, you can attempt certain Craft checks even when no tools are available, though you take a â2 penalty

name: Signature Moves
benefit: Your starting equipment includes a single masterwork item worth less than 900 gp, and you gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Intimidate checks while wielding this item in one or both hands

name: Simple Disciple
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks with a Profession or Craft skill of your choice
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Simple Disciple You picked up skill in a craft or a profession during your time at a monastery.

name: Snowbound
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against cold effects and a +2 trait bonus on Fortitude saves against the effects of cold weather

name: Student of Philosophy
benefit: You can use your Intelligence modifier in place of your Charisma modifier on Diplomacy checks to persuade others and on Bluff checks to convince others that a lie is true. (This trait does not affect Diplomacy checks to gather information or Bluff checks to feint in combat)

name: Style Sage
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks with your choice of either Knowledge (local) or Knowledge (history), and the one you choose is always a class skill for you. In addition, you gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks made to gather information about any person with levels in monk
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Style Sage You have a passion for history and news concerning monastic disciplines.

name: Subjective Truth
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on Bluff checks to lie, provided the person you’re lying to has never known you to lie to him. Failing this check counts as being caught in a lie by the target, negating any future use of this bonus against that person

name: Supportive
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on skill checks to use the aid another action

name: Suspicious
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks, and Sense Motive is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Suspicious You discovered at an early age that someone you trusted, perhaps an older sibling or a parent, had lied to you, and lied often, about something you had taken for granted, leaving you quick to question the claims of others.

name: Talented
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on checks with a single Perform skill (your choice), and all Perform skills are always class skills for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Talented You are a virtuoso musician, actor, or storyteller.

name: Tireless Logic
benefit: Once per day when you make an Intelligence -based skill check or ability check, you can roll twice and take the better result
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Tireless Logic Your curious mind figures out even the most complex problems.

name: Tropical Upbringing
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against fire effects and a +2 trait bonus on Fortitude saves against the effects of hot weather

name: Trustworthy
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks made to fool someone. You also gain a +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks, and Diplomacy is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Trustworthy People find it easy to put their faith in you.

name: Truth’s Agent
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Diplomacy checks made to gather information and all Knowledge (local) checks. Knowledge (local) is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Truth’s Agent You are skilled at weeding out information.

name: Unabashed Gall
benefit: Whenever you commit an unexpected and outrageously unlawful act (such as knowingly destroying or stealing something) that would elicit a hostile response from another creature, you may attempt a Bluff check opposed by the opponent’s Sense Motive check. If you’re successful, you and any allies who were willfully expecting your unlawful deed may act in a surprise round. For each ally willfully expecting your unlawful deed, you take a cumulative â2 penalty on your Bluff check. If your Bluff check fails, there is no surprise round. Regardless of whether your Bluff check succeeds, you and any allies willfully taking advantage of your unlawful deed treat your initiative checks for the duration of combat as though you had each rolled a 1

name: Unintentional Linguist
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Linguistics checks, and you begin play knowing one of the following languages (in addition to those granted by your race and Intelligence modifier): Abyssal, Aquan, Celestial, Ignan, Infernal, Protean, or Terran
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Unintentional Linguist You can speak with outsiders.

name: Unnatural Revenge
benefit: You gain a +2 trait bonus on all Intimidate checks against creatures of the animal , fey , or plant type, and Intimidate is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Unnatural Revenge

name: Unpredictable
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, and Bluff is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Unpredictable Your actions often seem random and chaotic to others, but there is a method to your madness.

name: Untapped Potential
benefit: Once per day, you can cast detect psychic significance or telekinetic projectile as a spell-like ability , with a caster level equal to your character level

name: Unwelcome Business
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Disguise or Sleight of Hand checks, and that skill becomes a class skill for you. In addition, choose one humanoid species; you ignore the â2 penalty on Disguise checks to disguise yourself as a member of that species

name: Veiled Disciple
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks made to pass secret messages and a +1 trait bonus on saving throws against charm and compulsion effects
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Veiled Disciple Trained in espionage, you’re skilled at passing messages and staying on task.

name: Vigilant Spycatcher
benefit: If you roll less than 10 on Perception checks to see through disguises, determine your result as if you had rolled 10

name: Wanderlust
benefit: Treat your base land speed as 10 feet higher when determining your overland speed

name: Wasteland Vagrant
benefit: When you gain this trait, pick one type of wasteland from the following list: blighted, Abyssal, desert, or waterlogged. You gain a +2 trait bonus on Survival checks in that type of wasteland terrain. (The GM determines whether terrain falls into the chosen type of wasteland.) Once you choose a type of wasteland terrain to gain this benefit in, you cannot change it later

name: Weathered Emissary
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on all Linguistics and Survival checks, and Linguistics is always a class skill for you
description: Home > Traits > Social Traits > Weathered Emissary Your travels in the wildlands gave you insight into how to survive their dangers and communicate with their inhabitants.

name: Wicked Leader
benefit: You gain a +1 trait bonus on Charisma checks against evil creatures. If you select the Leadership feat or the Vile Leadership feat at any point when you meet the prerequisites for that feat, you can recruit a cohort who is up to 1 level lower than you (instead of the normal requirement that your cohort must be 2 or more levels lower than you are) as long as your cohort is evil. Pick up Champions of Corruption AND support this site!
